description_long: This object is a vintage-style fax machine with a robust, boxy metal exterior featuring a weathered, industrial finish. The front face displays a wide paper feed slot with a partially exposed roll of paper, and a metallic panel below that may serve as an access door or tray. The sides are adorned with embossed circular and fleur-de-lis motifs, adding a decorative touch to the utilitarian design. A side compartment with a vented grill and a yellow indicator panel is visible, possibly for cooling or housing electronics. The rear view reveals a thick, coiled power cable emerging from the base, and the top surface is flat with subtle wear marks. The overall construction suggests durability, with most surfaces showing signs of use and age, consistent with equipment found in urban service environments.
description: A rugged, vintage fax machine with a metal body, exposed paper roll, and decorative embossed side panels. It features a front paper feed slot, side vent, and a coiled power cable.
description_view_0: The front view shows the exposed paper roll, a wide paper feed slot, a metallic lower panel, and a yellow indicator on the left side.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the embossed circular and fleur-de-lis motifs, the side compartment with a vented grill, and the absence of visible controls.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the paper feed mechanism, a metallic lower panel, and the thick coiled power cable emerging from the base.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left with similar embossed motifs and a side compartment, but without the yellow indicator panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: No visible control panel or buttons are present on any side; the front and sides are dominated by the paper feed slot, metallic panels, and decorative embossing.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is integrated into the front of the machine, with a horizontal slot and a partially exposed paper roll. No adjustable guides or covers are visible.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the front center, just above the metallic lower panel, with the paper emerging directly outward.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the object.
